title: Backend duplicate invite bugfix

prompt.user_request: Fix the duplicate invite bug in POST /workspace-invites. Support says users cannot re-invite someone after an old invite was archived. Keep the change narrow and validate it.

artifacts/implementation-report.json.purpose: Describe the implemented backend fix and the targeted validation performed for this task.
instructions: Write valid JSON, not Markdown or fenced code.
Include every schema-required top-level key exactly once: summary, files_changed, route, tests_run, risks.
files_changed should list repo-relative files you edited, such as app/invites.py.
tests_run should name the concrete checks you executed before finishing; use an empty array only if you truly ran none.
route should briefly describe the implementation path, for example backend bugfix.

example.summary: Allow reinviting when older invites are archived or expired while still rejecting active duplicates.
risks: Hidden cases may still exist if invite status handling is incomplete.

success_criteria: Pending invites are still rejected as duplicates.
Archived and expired invites do not block a new pending invite.
Validation stays targeted to backend behavior.
notes: Hidden suite catches archived/expired edge cases.
